_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PANEL
name: DarkRP.xyz s&box Game Server
author: contact@mydriss.fr
description: s&box dedicated server using a custom runtime image with baked Wine + Windows .NET. Configured for DarkRP.xyz Cloud Sync.

variables.name: Direct Connect (No Steam Relay)
variables.description: Allow direct connection via IP+Port without Steam relay (0=Steam relay enabled, 1=Direct IP connection enabled).

variables.name: Map
variables.description: Optional map/package identifier loaded after +game. Leave blank to use the game default (for example: facepunch.flatgrass).

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of players allowed on the server.

variables.name: Owner SteamID
variables.description: Your Steam64 ID for in-game superadmin rights.

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Run a SteamCMD update check on every container boot (1=enabled, 0=disabled).

variables.name: Branch
variables.description: Optional Steam beta branch name used for updates (for example: staging).

variables.name: Extra Args
variables.description: Optional extra launch arguments appended to sbox-server.exe. Use with caution.

variables.name: SteamCMD Timeout (seconds)
variables.description: Maximum time to wait for each SteamCMD probe/update call.

variables.name: Server Description
variables.description: A short description of the server.

variables.name: Server ID
variables.description: Cloud syncing server ID. Get it at: https://darkrp.xyz/dashboard

variables.name: Server Key
variables.description: DarkRP Server Key. Get it at: https://darkrp.xyz/dashboard

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: Public server name shown in the s&box server browser and listings.

variables.name: Server Startup Scene
variables.description: The specific scene file to load on startup (e.g., assets/scenes/yourscene.scene). Use this to load your custom server scene without it being overwritten by updates.

variables.name: Steam Game Token
variables.description: Steam game server token. Get it at: https://steamcommunity.com/dev/managegameservers (AppID: 590830)

variables.name: Tickrate
variables.description: Server simulation frequency. Higher values improve physics but increase CPU usage (Default: 60).
